title: MCC Icon
description: Change the Minecraft window and taskbar icons to the MCC Island logo
body:
![Gay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/74aTv108/images/071b0da4b0956d18fe61c0d1c37f3a92dc3a3f0a.webp)

Change the Minecraft icon and taskbar/macos dock icon to the [MCC Island](https://mcchampionship.com/) logo

**This mod is in no way affiliated or endorsed by MCC Island or the Noxcrew**

<summary>Preview</summary>
